catalog_content:
Item Name: Food to Live Organic Carrot Powder, 1 Pound – Non-GMO, Ground Raw Dried Roots, Vegan, Bulk, Great for Baking, Juices, Smoothies, Shakes, and Drinks. Good Source of Dietary Fiber, Potassium, Vitamin A Bullet Point 1: ✔️ USDA ORGANIC & NON-GMO: Food to Live Carrot Dried Powder is an Organic and Non-GMO product. Moreover, it is Kosher and Raw, thus can be included in vegan and vegetarian diets. Bullet Point 2: ✔️ HIGHLY NUTRITIOUS: Organic Carrot Powder is a truthful multivitamin, it contains a large amount of vitamins A, B, C, and K, and is dense in Zinc, Magnesium, Magnesium, Calcium, and Potassium. Bullet Point 3: ✔️ BETA-CAROTENE SOURCE: Our Organic Dried Carrot Powder is loaded with antioxidant Beta-carotene, which is skin-friendly. Bullet Point 4: ✔️ VERSATILE USE: With Organic Powdered Carrot spice up your fish and meat dishes, add it to smoothies, pie, cookies, bread, pastries, pancakes, or make a delicious puree. Bullet Point 5: ✔️ FOOD COLORING AGENT: Toss your artificial food coloring and use Organic Carrot Powder by Food to Live instead. Not only will it make your frosting and batter vibrant, it will also fill it with nutritional value. Product Description: Having high antioxidant properties Food to Live Organic Carrot Powder can become your favorite addition to countless dishes. It’s should be pointed out that contrary to Organic Carrot Juice Powder, our Organic Dried Carrot Powder is made from dried carrot roots. Only fresh quality carrots are selected, dried, and milled into powder which is then sieved for being a fine grind. As follows fresh Organic Pure Carrot Powder has a noticeable pleasant carrot taste.

Nutritional value
No doubt, Organic Dehydrated Carrot Powder has an abundant quantity of beta-carotene, Vitamins (A, C, B6, and, K) & Minerals (Zinc, Magnesium, Magnesium, Calcium, Potassium). So, regular consumption of this powder will give you only impressive benefits.

Ways of usage
Don’t be afraid to experiment with Organic Pure Carrot Powder as it may be used in baking as a food coloring agent. Add carrot powder to pastries, bread, cookies, cream cheesecake frostings, and pancakes. With ground dried carrot you may also try preparing various marinades, or simply use it as seasoning for your fish or meat dishes.

It’s very common to use Organic Carrot Powder for smoothies, adding 1 tsp in your favorite juices, or simply mixing it with water. Please keep in mind to follow recommended daily dosage of 1-2 teaspoons since excess beta-carotene can cause your skin to become yellowish-orange. This product is packed with beta-carotene so you will need only a small amount of it to enrich your meal.

For longer shelf life it’s best to store the tightly sealed package in a cool dark place with no humidity. Value: 16.0 Unit: Ounce
overall_summary: Organic and non-GMO carrot powder positioned as a nutritious, versatile ingredient for baking, smoothies, and cooking. Mid-tier pricing likely due to organic certification and health-focused marketing. Bulk 1-pound packaging suggests value-oriented targeting for health-conscious consumers.
